area: Route 8, Moor of Icirrus - All Seasons

methods.method: Grass, Surface, Normal                   Grass, Surface, Doubles

encounters.species: When you first make it to Route 5, Bianca will demonstrate the Hidden Grotto mechanic.
You will always encounter a Lv. 30 Stantler here.
This replaces the overpowered Munchlax from BB2 and VW2 and the fairly useless Minccino of the vanilla games.
